AOTrino

This exact page is running in both windows. The difference is entirely in .NET: the left window hosts this WebView as one composition visual; the right window hosts it as a classic child HWND.

🧩
⚡
🎛️

The left (composition) window paints three live .NET layers over this page: a glow that follows your mouse, a Direct2D HUD showing a live CPU graph (top-right) and a pulsing status bar — while the page stays fully clickable. The right (HWND) window shows none of it: its WebView is an opaque child window, so native code can't draw over it. Close either window to exit.
